title: Resolved evidence query with content
goal: Add a single RepoBrief/rLens query surface that returns top-k resolved evidence results with snippet text, source path, line range, citation id, range ref, artifact role, authority labels, freshness and availability in one bounded call.

acceptance.assertion: A query result includes resolved text snippets plus source path and line range when available.
Each result carries citation_id or range_ref and states whether that reference was verified.
Results include freshness and availability state and never trigger snapshot creation or refresh.
Machine-readable JSON preserves line numbers and avoids a schema shape that requires manual range_ref reconstruction.
The query result does not claim semantic completeness, runtime correctness, test sufficiency or review completeness.

metadata.source_gap: Max-dump critique: current search requires multiple manual steps and query JSON loses line-number utility.
metadata.outcome: Implemented in Lenskit PR #912: RepoBrief now exposes a read-only resolved evidence query surface with text excerpts, paths, line ranges, citation/range verification, freshness and availability.
validation: Lenskit PR #912 GitHub CI passed: CodeQL, pytest-full, ruff, planning-registration, doc-freshness, validate-merge-meta, contract guards, webui-js-tests.
Local: python3 -m pytest -q merger/lenskit/tests/test_repobrief_*.py merger/lenskit/tests/test_cli_query_profiles.py merger/lenskit/tests/test_api_query.py -> 150 passed.
Local: python3 -m ruff check targeted files -> pass.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t001-content-results: Resolved evidence hits now expose text_excerpt, text_truncated, source_path, line_range, source_line_range, artifact_path and artifact_line_range.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t001-citation-binding: Resolved hits carry range_ref, range_ref_verified, citation_id, citation, citation_status and citation_verified.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t001-freshness: query_existing_index and resolved_evidence carry snapshot availability and freshness; read paths keep read_paths_do_not_refresh=True.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t001-json-shape: repobrief query emits JSON with directly usable line_range fields and no manual range_ref reconstruction requirement for normal evidence reading.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t001-non-claims: Proof and PR body state no semantic completeness, runtime correctness, test sufficiency, review completeness, agent quality improvement, stale-bundle validity or merge readiness.
